brief.rationale: Copy has no anthro verbs, no wordplay, no Not-Just construction, no em-dash asides — should fail cookunity_voice_signals only.

email.subject_a: Maya Patel cauliflower steak available now, {{first_name}}
email.subject_b: Maya Patel new cauliflower steak option this week
email.body: A new tandoori cauliflower steak from Maya Patel is now available, {{first_name}}. The dish includes coconut yogurt and is ready in two minutes. To add it to your plan, please tap the link below. [Add to plan]({{short_url}})

sms.body: Hello {{first_name}}. Tandoori cauliflower steak from Maya Patel is available. Tap to order: {{short_url}}

push.title: New dish available from Maya Patel
push.body: Tap to view tandoori cauliflower steak today.
